title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Welcome & Farewell
subtitle: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Configure welcome and farewell messages, images, and auto-roles.
loadingSubtitle: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Configure welcome and farewell messages for your server.

welcome.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Welcome Message
welcome.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Send a custom embed when a new member joins.

welcomeImage.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Welcome Image
welcomeImage.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Generate a custom image card with the member's avatar when they join.
welcomeImage.disabled: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Enable the toggle above to configure welcome images.

farewell.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Farewell Message
farewell.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Send a message when a member leaves the server.

farewellImage.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Farewell Image
farewellImage.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Generate a custom farewell card when a member leaves.
farewellImage.disabled: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Enable the toggle above to configure farewell images.

dm.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Welcome DM
dm.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Send a direct message to new members. Will silently fail if DMs are disabled.

autorole.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Auto-Role
autorole.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Automatically assign roles to new members when they join. Bots are excluded. The bot must have a role higher than the roles listed here.
autorole.label: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Role IDs (comma-separated)
